# Smilery — Orthodontics, Reimagined

> Modern orthodontics practice in Miami Shores, FL — Opening Summer 2026

## About

Smilery is a modern orthodontics practice reimagining the orthodontic experience. Founded by Dr. Lorem Ipsum, DMD, MS, Smilery combines cutting-edge orthodontic technology with a design-forward, patient-first approach. We believe everyone deserves a beautiful smile in a comfortable, welcoming environment.

## Location & Contact

- **Address:** 123 NE 2nd Ave, Miami Shores, FL 33138
- **Phone:** (305) 555-0100
- **Email:** hello@smilery.com
- **Website:** https://smilery.com
- **Hours:** Mon–Thu 9am–6pm, Fri 9am–4pm
- **Languages:** English, Spanish, Portuguese

## Services

- **Traditional Metal Braces** — High-quality metal braces for effective teeth alignment, suitable for children, teens, and adults
- **Ceramic Braces** — Tooth-colored ceramic braces for a more discreet treatment experience
- **Invisalign Clear Aligners** — Virtually invisible custom-made removable trays for teeth straightening
- **Clear Aligner Therapy** — Premium clear aligners for adults and teens seeking discreet alternatives
- **Retainers** — Custom retainers in clear and traditional options for post-treatment maintenance
- **Early Orthodontic Treatment (Phase I)** — Intervention for children ages 7–10 to guide jaw growth
- **Surgical Orthodontics** — Treatment coordinated with oral surgery for complex jaw alignment cases
- **Orthodontic Consultations** — Comprehensive evaluation with digital X-rays, 3D scanning, and personalized treatment plans

## Team

- **Dr. Lorem Ipsum, DMD, MS** — Board-certified orthodontist, American Board of Orthodontics certified, member of the American Association of Orthodontists, American Dental Association, and Florida Dental Association. Over 10 years of experience in modern orthodontic techniques.

## Insurance & Payment

- Accepts most major dental insurance plans (Delta Dental, Cigna, Aetna, MetLife, United Healthcare, Guardian, Humana, BlueCross BlueShield)
- Flexible financing options and payment plans available
- Cash and credit cards accepted
- Free initial orthodontic consultation

## Areas Served

Miami Shores, Miami, North Miami, Biscayne Park, El Portal, Miami Beach, Aventura, and surrounding South Florida communities.

## Amenities

- Free parking
- Wheelchair accessible
- Free Wi-Fi
- Complimentary beverages
- TV in treatment rooms

## Status

Opening Summer 2026. Currently accepting waitlist signups at https://smilery.com/book-appointment

## Frequently Asked Questions

**When is Smilery opening?**
Summer 2026 in Miami Shores, FL. Join the waitlist for priority scheduling.

**What orthodontic services do you offer?**
Full range: traditional braces, ceramic braces, Invisalign, clear aligners, retainers, early treatment for kids, and surgical orthodontics.

**Do you accept insurance?**
Yes, most major dental insurance plans are accepted. Financing and payment plans are also available.

**What age should my child first see an orthodontist?**
The American Association of Orthodontists recommends age 7 for the first evaluation.

**How do I join the waitlist?**
Visit https://smilery.com/book-appointment and fill out the form.
